subcodes.first_line: God grant that, through His grace, thou mayest attain to that which is beloved in the estimation of the Lord of Abraham, Isaac, and Jacob
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت الهی بانچه الیوم نزد رب ابراهیم و اسحق و یعقوب محبوب است فائز باشی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power of the Manifestation of God, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael
